description: 五行英语牌 — 句子组（含 intermediate）

groups.context_cn: 我们必须保持房间干净
groups.target_sentence: We must keep the room clean

groups.context_cn: 他们昨晚看了一部电影
groups.target_sentence: They watched a movie last night

They arrived at the station late
I enjoyed the party very much
The cat is under the bed

They are building a new house

She is talking to her friend
There is a big tree in the garden
There are many books on the shelf
There was a strange noise last night

There is a park near my house
There are many flowers in spring
There is a bridge across the river

There are two apples in the bowl

groups.context_cn: 我喜欢苹果但她喜欢橙子
groups.target_sentence: I like apples but she likes oranges

groups.context_cn: 他待在家里因为下雨了
groups.target_sentence: He stayed home because it rained

If you try you will succeed

groups.context_cn: 她笑了虽然她感到难过
groups.target_sentence: She laughed although she felt sad

groups.target_sentence: We sang and danced at the party

groups.target_sentence: I called you but you did not answer

groups.context_cn: 我们以前看过这部电影
groups.target_sentence: We have seen this movie before
